programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Lovebirds Sydney and Sebastian have decided to take on their next big adventure and invest in a coastal dream property where they can live with their young boys while running a hospitality business; while they have years of real estate investing under their belts, they've never run this type of business before, so they are excited to try.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Growing up in England, living by the water was only a dream for the wealthy; after moving to Nova Scotia as a teenager, that dream of ocean living became something that might one day be accessible to her.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Lisa and Kelly are ready for a new adventure and have set their sights on Cape Breton as the place they hope to call home. With their youngest daughter Brittney along for the ride, they are searching for the perfect forever home that lets them embrace coastal living while still giving Brittney the space to grow and thrive. Will they find a home that makes it all possible?

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Long-time friends and now partners, Kirby and Menna are on the hunt for their perfect home together; they are both avid water enthusiasts and want a home where they can have great parties.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Misty and Derrick have always felt a deep connection to the ocean; after facing health challenges, they realized life is too short not to live where their hearts belong; now they are on the hunt for a rural home that offers a seaside lifestyle while keeping them close to nature; will they find the perfect balance of peace, ocean, and adventure?

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: College sweethearts Amy and Aron never imagined they would be empty nesters in their 40's, but here they are with two children about to move out and their dreams of retiring by the ocean closer than ever; they have decided to live that dream now and are on the hunt for a home by the water with enough land to have a few goats.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: After meeting in the military, Janaya and Benoit instantly connected. Janaya has always dreamed of returning to Nova Scotia, and Benoit is ready to help make that dream a reality; now they are on the hunt for a seaside home that keeps them close to family, offers a private retreat for just the two of them, and gives them the perfect place to build their life together.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Kelly grew up moving from base to base in a military family and always dreamed of a place to call home; then she met Tim, also in the military, and together they now have two beautiful children; with Tim retired, they are ready to finally put down roots, find a home, and give their kids the chance to grow up in a close-knit community while living the East Coast lifestyle they've always imagined; w

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Emily and Kye are home flippers and landlords; since they have been together, they have only ever lived in homes with tenants, but after their second daughter was born, they decided they had had enough of sharing space.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Susanna and Will have spent their entire relationship renovating and flipping homes; they have never lived in a home that is just for them; with their two boys out of the house, they have decided it's time to have the home they've always wanted.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Jason has become a recluse because of a giant growth on the back of his neck; Marisa hates the red spider veins on her face; Kobe hums to stay calm as student Gili helps Dr. Lee remove a huge bump near his eye.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Bryan has a genetic condition that may be causing huge mystery bumps; Chalamar cannot dress how she wants because of her ugly chest bump; Dr. Lee enlists Dr. Lyndsey's surgical assistance to help sexy grandma Devi get her bikini body back.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Stephanie has dreams of being a caterer, but is humiliated by her giant baseball-sized scalp bump; Deb is afraid that the growth on the side of her knee may eventually paralyze her.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy makes money at an auction in Montclair; Darrell finds something that will launch him to new heights; Brandi worries that a hangover will compromise Jarrod's buying; Dave returns.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers target Dave Hester on his home turf of Costa Mesa, Calif.; Darrell and Brandon go over the top; Jarrod and Brandi's discovery takes them where no bidder has gone before.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers go to Moreno Valley, Calif.; Darrell tries to play nice; Barry Weiss lands an uncertain score.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene steals the units in Rancho Palos Verdes, Calif.; Mary's locker reveals a sticky past; Justin demonstrates he can turn a small investment into a big return.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers look for textbooks and rare university artifacts in Fullerton, Calif.; Barry uncovers antique vinyl; Jarrod and Brandi battle their colleagues.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers visit Moreno Valley, Calif.; Justin's congeniality earns him Rene's goodwill and a chance to level up; Darrell's tubular locker tests out okay.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: All the buyers are excited about the upscale potential of Rancho Palos Verdes, but it's Dave who finds his loot there; Brandi racks up a decent profit while saving herself from having to shell out for shelving; in Garden Grove, Kerri keeps Lisa focused long enough to weave a profit, while Kenny faces his fears in a new way.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: With big bids, bold personalities, and a little family drama, everyone's trying to keep up with the Nezhodas.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The city of Hemet reminds Kenny of a certain English poet, but he ends up focusing on the Eastern arts; Ivy spreads holiday joy as he battles it out with a new buyer who isn't all that intimidated.

programme.desc: C. Opanowski survived a vicious attack by her ex-boyfriend, Shawn Doyle, a man she once trusted. Doyle pleaded guilty to menacing in the second degree.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The murder of Ivy League student Blaze Bernstein, allegedly murdered because he was gay and Jewish, and the trial of former high school classmate Sam Woodward.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials try to get a convicted serial killer to reveal where he left the body of Sara Anne Wood, a 12-year-old girl he murdered 30 years ago.

programme.title: Descent of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Lonnie Franklin Jr, dubbed the 'Southside Slayer' was believed to be responsible for stabbing and strangling at least 13 sex workers between 1983 and 1985.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Manor House Inn in Northumberland. Guests Tony and Paula are immediately enamoured of the honeymoon suite. But one B&Ber has a headboard headache.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers embrace the great outdoors at Orchard Glamping in Lancashire. Hosts Tom and Becky hope their pristine pods are pitch perfect. But there's one unhappy camper in their midst.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Tony and Paula host the week's third visit at Hotel Ellenby in Scarborough, where they reckon stunning sea views and local history will be a winning combination. The breakfast, not so much.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week's final visit is to The Crown Inn in Derbyshire, where a trip to an old mill proves to be inexplicably popular. More so than Dean's supposedly legendary breakfast, anyway..

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Tranquillity. Relaxation. Unfortunately, it's payment day, so there's none of that here. Instead, there are slanderous sleep scores, bad breakfasts, and a no-show from two B&Bers.

programme.title: Live: The Boat Race
programme.desc: Live coverage of the men's and women's races, as rowers from Cambridge and Oxford heave their way along the Thames, in one of the world's most prestigious amateur sporting events.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.
